description_long: This bird features a vibrant yellow body with contrasting dark gray to black wings and tail feathers. Its head is predominantly yellow, with a subtle transition to the darker coloration on the wings and back. The beak is slender, straight, and pale pinkish, well-suited for insectivorous or frugivorous feeding. The wings display a smooth, solid color pattern with minimal barring, and the tail is relatively straight and slightly rounded at the tip. The legs are short and dark, mostly hidden beneath the body. The overall form is streamlined, suggesting a species adapted for agile flight.
description: A streamlined yellow bird with dark gray wings and tail, and a slender pale beak.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full yellow body, dark wings, and straight pale beak.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the dark tail and back, with yellow visible on the sides.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the yellow body and dark wing pattern.
description_view_3: Front view emphasizing the yellow head, pale beak, and subtle wing edges.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid yellow body with dark wings and tail, minimal barring
